infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to record household GPS coordinates and find nearby households.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses your location for household data collection.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to capture landmark images for households.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app uses your photo library to attach landmark images to households.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Voter App to use your location for recording household coordinates.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Voter App to use your photos for household landmark images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Voter App to use your camera for household landmark images.
